sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, CC, Contract, ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK,Flex8) (Select KeyID, CO, GL, CC, Contract, ProdCode, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, '' as PK,'orig' as Flex8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, CO, GL, CC, Contract, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
update TransX set Amt1 = Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080'
update TransX set Amt2 = Amt3, Amt3 = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-save' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode = 'CHGBACK'

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'3080' as Co,'3GSA100019' as CC,CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,-Amt1,-Amt1,-Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and not CC in ('3GSS110000','3GSS120000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'3080' as Co,'3GSS120000' as CC,CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,-Amt1,-Amt1,-Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC in ('3GSS110000','3GSS120000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'2008' as Co,'5USA000079' as CC, CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC = '3GSA100016')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'2008' as Co,'5USA000080' as CC, CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC = '3GSA100017')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'2008' as Co,'5USA000078' as CC, CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC = '3GSA100020')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'2008' as Co,'5USA000088' as CC, CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC = '3GSA100021')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'2008' as Co,'5USA000071' as CC, CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC = '3GSA100024')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,CC,Contract,ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,'2008' as Co,'1USU200302' as CC, CC as Contract,'CHGBACK' as ProdCode,Amt1,Amt2,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'orig' and CC = '3GSS110000')
Update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]', Flex8 = NULL, Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = (case when Co = '2008' then -Amt2 else -Amt1 end), Amt3 = -Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'
Update TransX set TP = coalesce(TP,''),PC = coalesce(PC,''),Flex3 = coalesce(Flex3,'') where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex3,Flex9) (Select KeyID, Co,GL, PC, CC, Contract, ProdCode, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, Flex3, 'pass1' as Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL group by KeyID,Co,GL,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Flex3 )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex9 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Co,PC,TP,CC,ProdCode,Flex3) (Select KeyID, '1999901' as GL, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '2008' as Co,'1400000000' as PC, '3080' as TP, '' as CC, '' as ProdCode, '' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' group by KeyID)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Co,PC,TP,CC,ProdCode,Flex3) (Select KeyID, '1999901' as GL, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '3080' as Co,'3990000000' as PC, '2008' as TP, '' as CC, '' as ProdCode, '' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3080' group by KeyID)
update TransX set Crcy = 'GBP', Txt = 'NGSL Chargeback for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not CC in ('1USU200302','3GSS110000','3GSS120000')
update TransX set Crcy = 'GBP', Txt = 'NL UW NGSL Chargeback for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC in ('1USU200302','3GSS110000','3GSS120000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Co,PC,CC,Contract,ProdCode,TP,Flex3) (Select KeyID, 'GBP', '1998900' as GL, Txt = 'NGSL Chargeback for [Yr]/[Mo] ' + GL, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '2008' as Co,'1400000000' as PC, '' as CC, '3GSA100018' as Contract,'' as ProdCode,'F0046' as TP, '' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = '3GSA100018' group by KeyID, GL)
Update TransX set GL = '2899901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901' and Amt1 < 0
Update TransX set GL = '2898900' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1998900' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set GL = '6110003' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and GL = '6112000'
update TransX set GL = '6111006' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and GL = '6112001'
update TransX set GL = '6211000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and GL = '6211004'
update TransX set GL = '6214000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and GL = '6214003'
update TransX set GL = '6419002' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and GL = '6419003'
update TransX set GL = '6610002' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and GL = '6610006'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Txt, Contract, TP, ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Txt, Contract, TP, ProdCode, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Txt, Contract, TP, ProdCode)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex3,PK) (Select KeyID, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Txt, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3,Flex3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1' and not Co is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Txt,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex3,PK) (Select KeyID, Crcy, Co, GL, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Txt, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3,Flex3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK= '1' and not Co is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PK is NULL or PK = '1' or Co is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
